name: Second Martial Law
era: The 1962 Constitution and the Second Martial Law (1962–1969)
key_provisions: Constitution abrogated; assemblies dissolved; Yahya as CMLA and (from 31 March 1969) President
Extra-constitutional transfer later condemned as usurpation in Asma Jilani (1972)
demise: The regime collapsed with the loss of East Pakistan; Yahya resigned on 20 December 1971.
